untranslatable_reason: The Market Direction Indicator (MDI) is not available in the allowed indicators list. MDI is a custom indicator defined as: 100 × (Crossover Price yesterday − Crossover Price today) / Average of past N days' prices. This requires a custom calculation involving 'Crossover Price' which is not a standard price field (open/high/low/close/volume). The formula parameters are incomplete in the source material ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders). Without access to MDI or its component definitions, the zero-line crossover conditions cannot be accurately translated.
translation_notes: Signal requires Market Direction Indicator (MDI) which is not in the allowed indicators list. The source text appears incomplete/corrupted ('100 x (Crossover Price yecions — CYOS'). Cannot determine the exact calculation of MDI or what 'Crossover Price' represents without additional specification. Recommend: (1) Add MDI as a pre-calculated indicator to the backtest engine, or (2) Define the complete MDI formula with standard OHLCV components.
